# Solutions Architect Handoff Template

```text
HANDOFF_PACKET
From: Solutions Architect
To: <Senior Software Engineer | Senior Database Administrator | Senior UI UX Specialist>
Task:
Context:
Decisions:
Open Questions:
Risks:
Acceptance Criteria:
Artifacts Updated:
Learning Note ID:
```

## Completion Rule
A handoff is complete only when implementation owners accept scope boundaries and constraints.
